description: Compact main-text qualitative panels transposed from existing per-sample grids.
sampling: No new sampling; cells are exact crops from existing image-only per-sample grids.

outputs.name: cifar10_truck_seed3018
outputs.layout: transposed step rows; DG-TWFD column highlighted with a thin dark border
outputs.caption_note: CIFAR-10 class-conditional comparison for truck, seed 3018. Rows fix the inference budget and columns fix the method. CIFAR-10 JAX consistency-model baselines are seed-only references because the released checkpoints are not class-conditional.

outputs.name: imagenet64_class0407_seed3109
outputs.layout: transposed step rows; DG-TWFD column highlighted with a thin dark border
outputs.caption_note: ImageNet64 class-locked comparison for class 0407, seed 3109. Rows fix the inference budget and columns fix the method. DG-TWFD preserves the target vehicle class more consistently under low-step inference.
